metadata.name: Install Docker on Ubuntu
metadata.description: Installs Docker Engine on Ubuntu systems using the official Docker APT repository.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
This playbook installs Docker Engine on Ubuntu from Docker's official APT repository.

## Prerequisites
- Target hosts must be supported Ubuntu releases with outbound package repository access.
- Decide whether you want to add a non-root user to the `docker` group after install.

## Run
1. Render `main.yml` and confirm the target hosts and post-install user settings.
2. Run the playbook against the Ubuntu hosts.
3. Reconnect the target user session if you add it to the `docker` group.

## Docs
- [Docker Engine Install (Ubuntu)](https://docs.docker.com/engine/install/ubuntu/)
- [Docker Documentation](https://docs.docker.com/)
